ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was resolved */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the issue occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the issue */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "resolution_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to resolve the issue */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* How often the issue can be reproduced */,
  "build_version" TEXT /* Build version where the issue was found */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the issue belongs to */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES issue_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, project manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Numerical weight for sorting and prioritization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Windows, MacOS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the environment (e.g., 32-bit, 64-bit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote" INTEGER /* Whether the vote is positive (true) or negative (false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_votes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attached file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, text) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was last updated */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_status_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_issues" (
  "project_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-issue association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related project */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the issue belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issues_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related issue */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., comment, status change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was logged */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)
